description: Production deployment supporting multiple concurrent users and larger datasets. Handles parallel analytical workloads with higher session counts and data volumes in the terabyte range. Suitable for departments running multiple SAS offerings simultaneously.
useCases: Multi-user analytics platform with higher concurrency (Visual Analytics + Statistics + VDMML)
Production fraud or credit scoring with moderate transaction volumes
Larger datasets requiring more CAS memory and compute capacity
Parallel batch and interactive workloads during business hours
Model development with larger training datasets (multi-GB per model)
dataVolume: Up to 1 TB on disk / up to 500 GB lifted into memory
kubernetesWorkers: Managed Kubernetes with auto-scaling. Multiple node pools for CAS, Compute, and Stateless services.
cpuPerNode: Varies by cloud provider — refer to official SAS sizing guide for exact instance types
ramPerNode: Sized for CAS in-memory processing of larger datasets with concurrent user sessions
storage: SSD/NVMe for SASWORK/CAS DISK CACHE. Shared filesystem (EFS/Azure Files/Filestore) for persistent volumes.
network: Accelerated networking and placement groups required. 10+ Gbps recommended for CAS distributed operations.
estimatedMonthlyCost: Contact SAS/VST ECS for cloud cost estimate based on your provider and region
hadrNotes: Multi-AZ recommended for production resilience. Auto-scaling between min_nodes (baseline) and max_nodes (peak capacity).
cloudVsOnprem: Available on AWS (EKS), Azure (AKS), Google Cloud (GKE), and Red Hat OpenShift. Hybrid deployments supported.
viyaTier: SAS Viya (Standard) or SAS Viya Advanced — Advanced adds econometrics, optimization, text analytics, and enterprise forecasting
typicalCustomers: Departmental analytics teams, mid-size banks, insurers, telco analytics groups
